<a id="class-player-finger-method-notify-entered-slider"></a>

 **notify_entered_slider**() [🔗](#class-player-finger-method-notify-entered-slider)

Call when this finger enters a slider’s activation area. Expands collision by 30% while in any slider.

---

<a id="class-player-finger-method-notify-exited-slider"></a>

 **notify_exited_slider**() [🔗](#class-player-finger-method-notify-exited-slider)

Call when this finger exits a slider’s activation area. Restores collision when not in any slider.
